calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Eric K. Shiu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CNET Networks, Inc.
Jonathan Kauders, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant OLM, LLC.
Amended default entered on July 16, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 12, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CNT Networks, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant OLM, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $78,750.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,966.64.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $755.00, for a total of $85,471.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Continued To Aug-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
